scripts.name: ClientCtl
scripts.source:
local ClientCtl = {}
ClientCtl.__index = ClientCtl

function ClientCtl.new(config)
    local self = setmetatable({}, ClientCtl)
    -- No serialized scalars; ``target`` (peer ServerCtl) and ``statusLabel``
    -- (Text/TextLabel) are reference fields injected on self before Awake.
    return self
end

function ClientCtl:Update(dt)
    local UserInputService = game:GetService("UserInputService")
    if UserInputService:IsKeyDown(Enum.KeyCode.E) and self.target ~= nil then
        self.target:CmdActivate()
    end
    if self.statusLabel ~= nil then
        self.statusLabel.Text = "ready"
    end
end

return ClientCtl

scripts.name: ServerCtl
scripts.source:
local ServerCtl = {}
ServerCtl.__index = ServerCtl

function ServerCtl.new(config)
    local self = setmetatable({}, ServerCtl)
    -- [SyncVar] scalar default; the replicating mirror is written in Awake/CmdActivate.
    self.activated = config.activated or false
    return self
end

function ServerCtl:Awake()
    -- [SyncVar] canonical mirror: publish the initial value as a replicating Attribute
    -- so clients and cross-script readers observe it.
    self.gameObject:SetAttribute("activated", self.activated)
end

function ServerCtl:CmdActivate()
    -- [Command] body: server-authoritative state change.
    self.activated = true
    -- [SyncVar] mirror: Attributes replicate server -> client, matching Mirror sync semantics.
    self.gameObject:SetAttribute("activated", true)
end

return ServerCtl
